---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: camera
      text: flickr
      href: https://www.flickr.com/photos/202433373@N03/
    - icon: mastodon
      text: mastodon
      href: https://genomic.social/@EisenRa
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/EisenRa
---

Kiwi/Aussie currently living in Copenhagen. This is my personal website where I post monthly round-ups, photos, and various musings.

Most photos are protected with a [CC BY-NC 4.0 license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/). If you're interested in using any for commercial purposes, feel free to get in touch at raph\[dot\]eisenhofer\[at\]gmail\[dot\]com

I built the website using the open source tools R and [quarto](https://quarto.org/). You can find the source code [here on GitHub](https://github.com/EisenRa/the_raph_round-up/tree/master).

Website traffic is monitored using [Umami](https://umami.is/) (open-source, no cookies, fingerprinting, or personal data).

This website and its contents are AI-free, see [here for my statement on AI use](ai_statement.qmd).
